instructions: Use screenshots for framing, setting, camera distance, motion beat, and hook pattern.
Keep identity, face, styling details, and final media original.
Use archetype names in prompts instead of creator handles.
higgsfieldUse.subjectRequirement: Original adult model or generated persona, clearly 21+.

liveCaptureStatus.note: Safari/X returned account does not exist on 2026-06-21; use operator screenshot only.

references.pattern: travel fantasy plus soft danger caption
references.setting: boat, tropical water, cliffs or lush background
references.composition: vertical full-body seated shot, scenic depth, relaxed confidence
safeCaptionSeeds: Vacation mode, but make it dangerous

references.composition: close vertical crop, casual movement, quick 5-7 second loop
safeCaptionSeeds: How many rewatches is too many?
This loop is too easy to replay

references.pattern: casual room fit check with simple identity label
references.composition: standing front frame, outfit adjustment, natural light

references.pattern: sunny pool/beach selfie plus direct engagement prompt
references.setting: pool, beach, resort seating, bright sun
references.composition: tight selfie crop, strong eye contact, outdoor color
safeCaptionSeeds: Be honest, pool day or beach day?

styleRules: no copied likeness or reposted media

concepts.name: tropical_trouble
concepts.promptSeed: Original 21+ brunette travel creator on a wooden boat in bright turquoise water, relaxed confident pose, cinematic phone video look, tropical cliffs in background, tasteful swimwear, luxury vacation energy.
concepts.caption: Sunshine with a little trouble

concepts.name: rewatch_turn
concepts.promptSeed: Original 21+ lifestyle creator in a clean bedroom, casual lounge outfit, quick playful turn toward camera, phone-native vertical crop, natural indoor light, soft candid movement.
concepts.caption: How many rewatches is too many?

concepts.name: weekend_fit
concepts.promptSeed: Original 21+ creator doing a casual weekend fit check in a bright apartment bathroom, simple outfit adjustment, confident smile, vertical phone framing, natural light.
concepts.caption: Too casual or just right?

concepts.name: pool_first_impression
concepts.promptSeed: Original 21+ creator at a sunny resort pool, close selfie framing, bright blue water, direct eye contact, polished but phone-native look, tasteful swimwear.
concepts.caption: First impression?
